stable_lessons_only: Exact-output requests should be fulfilled exactly when allowed.
User explicit instruction is the task oracle within higher-level constraints.
Scores/tests cannot override user scope or authority.
Self-generated tests are not independent verification.
When the user says '전 지시 유지', preserve active context invariants.
